title: House Robber
description:
You are a robber planning to rob houses along a street. Each house has some
money, but adjacent houses have connected alarms, so you cannot rob two
adjacent houses. Given an integer array `nums`, return the **maximum** amount
you can rob without alerting the police.

solutions.summary: At each house keep the best totals "including" vs "skipping" it.

steps.title: Track the two best totals
steps.explanation: `prev` is the best up to two houses back, `curr` the best up to the previous house.

steps.title: Choose to rob or skip each house
steps.explanation: The new best is the larger of skipping (`curr`) or robbing this house plus `prev`.
